# fly_org_member (Resource)

Manages a Fly.io organization member invitation. Import using org/email.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_org_member" "example" {
  org   = fly_org.example.slug
  email = "teammate@example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) The email address to invite. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `org` (String) The organization slug. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the membership (org/email).
